clusters.title: Apprentice tradies aren't included in the minimum wage bump
clusters.neutral_headline: Apprentice tradies aren't included in the minimum wage bump

items.title: Apprentice tradies aren't included in the minimum wage bump
items.standfirst: Apprentice tradies aren't included in the new minimum wage bump. New tradies sit under a different awards system, where an electrical apprentice can earn as little as $15.67 an hour if they've just left school early. So, how does this impact the apprenticeship scheme, which is sold on the idea of being paid while you learn?
items.content: Apprentice tradies aren't included in the new minimum wage bump. New tradies sit under a different awards system, where an electrical apprentice can earn as little as $15.67 an hour if they've just left school early. So, how does this impact the apprenticeship scheme, which is sold on the idea of being paid while you learn?
